title: Ant Control New Brunswick, NJ | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in New Brunswick, NJ starting at $350. Fast, effective ant extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available.
intro: New Brunswick residents face persistent ant problems due to the city's dense urban environment and proximity to the Raritan River. Our professional ant control services target all species common to Middlesex County, from pavement ants to carpenter ants. We provide comprehensive treatments for homes, apartments, and commercial properties throughout the Hub City.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving New Brunswick and surrounding communities with guaranteed ant elimination solutions. Our licensed technicians use safe, EPA-approved treatments suitable for family homes and businesses, with flexible scheduling including same-day service for urgent infestations.
localContext: New Brunswick's historic Victorian homes near Rutgers University campus and the newer developments along the riverfront each present unique ant control challenges that require specialized treatment approaches. The city's mix of residential neighborhoods, student housing, and commercial districts along George Street means year-round ant activity that demands professional intervention.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in New Brunswick typically range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: New Brunswick properties commonly deal with pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and occasionally pharaoh ants in multi-unit buildings. Carpenter ants are particularly problematic in older wooden structures throughout the city's historic neighborhoods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most New Brunswick locations. Emergency ant control is available for severe infestations, particularly carpenter ant problems that threaten structural integrity.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at convenient times to minimize disruption to your household.
